title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 58.620 - Coroner's duties as to costs
text:
58.620.  Coroner's duties as to costs. — It shall be the duty of the coroner to execute any requirement of the county commission, made by virtue of section 58.610, for the payment of fees at views and inquests.
(RSMo 1939 § 13256, A.L. 1955 p. 347) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11637; 1919 § 5945; 1909 § 2950
